attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SGAA.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER , 
SGAA.ADJUSTMENT_ID ,
SGAA.GLOBAL_NAME, 
COALESCE (NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS  ADJUSTMENT_INITIATOR_PARTY_KEY ,
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 			BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_AR_ADJUSTMENTS SGAA 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON ( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SGAA.GLOBAL_NAME)

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON (EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SGAA.ORG_ID)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU
ON (EFU.USER_ID = SGAA.CREATED_BY
AND EFU.GLOBAL_NAME  = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$HRVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
ON (NCWP.CEC_ID = EFU.USER_NAME
AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')
